title: PublishableSignal
description: Public-facing signal payload derived from local trading system signal records. Only publishable summary fields are exposed.

signal_id.description: Stable public identifier for the signal. Typically sourced from the internal trade GUID.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp for when the signal was created or published.

asset.description: Tradable instrument code exposed publicly. Typically sourced from the internal product field.

direction.description: Public direction derived from the internal signal field.

entry.description: Entry price for the signal. Typically sourced from entry_price.

tp.description: Take-profit level exposed publicly. Typically mapped from target_profit or an equivalent normalized target price.

sl.description: Stop-loss level exposed publicly. Typically mapped from target_loss or an equivalent normalized stop price.

strategy.description: Public strategy label. Typically sourced from strategy_name, model, or another sanitized strategy identifier.
